description_long: This is a row of attached residential houses, each with a pitched roof and dormer windows, set along a straight street. The houses feature symmetrical facades with multiple windows and prominent entryways, some with small porches or steps. The exterior is light-colored, likely finished in painted siding or stucco, and the roofs are shingled in a muted tone. The property is landscaped with evenly spaced deciduous trees in front and to the side, providing a suburban neighborhood feel. The sidewalk and street are clearly defined, with driveways or walkways leading up to each house. The overall design suggests a planned residential development with a cohesive architectural style.
description: A row of attached, light-colored suburban houses with pitched roofs, dormer windows, and landscaped with trees along a street.
description_view_0: Front view showing the symmetrical facades, entryways, and the main street with trees lining the sidewalk.
description_view_1: Angled side view highlighting the depth of the row houses, pitched roofs, and the arrangement of trees along the side.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the backyards, rear windows, and additional trees, with less emphasis on entryways.
description_view_3: Opposite angled side view showing the other end of the row, rooflines, and the continuation of tree landscaping.
attribute_entryway_design: Central front doors with small porches or steps, some with columns and overhangs, flanked by windows and decorative trim.
